# PrivatePaycheck

> Free paycheck and income tax calculator for US workers 2026. All 50 states. Federal + state taxes, FICA, 401k, HSA. 100% private — no data stored.

## Calculators

- [Free Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/) — all 50 states, federal + state tax
- [Federal Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/federal-paycheck-calculator) — IRS brackets, FICA, W-4
- [Hourly Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/hourly-paycheck-calculator) — hourly to annual, all states
- [1099 Self-Employment Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/1099-paycheck-calculator) — SE tax 15.3%
- [Bonus Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/bonus-tax-calculator) — supplemental rate 22%
- [Overtime Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/overtime-calculator) — 12,500 deduction
- [No Tax on Overtime Calculator](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/no-tax-on-overtime-deduction) — One Big Beautiful Bill
- [No Tax on Tips Calculator](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/no-tax-on-tips-calculator) — 25,000 cap 2026
- [Tips Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/tips-tax-calculator-2026) — annual savings estimate
- [Raise Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/raise-calculator) — after-tax impact of salary increase
- [Signing Bonus Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/signing-bonus-tax-calculator)
- [Two Jobs Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/two-jobs-tax-calculator) — combined withholding
- [W-4 Withholding Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/w4-withholding-calculator)
- [Senior 6000 Deduction Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/senior-deduction-calculator)
- [Trump Account Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/trump-account-calculator)
- [WEP Lump Sum Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/wep-lump-sum-calculator)
- [Compare Paycheck by State 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/compare-states-paycheck) — side by side
- [Minimum Wage by State 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/minimum-wage)
- [Unemployment Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/unemployment-calculator)

## State Paycheck Calculators

- [California Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/california-paycheck-calculator) — CA tax up to 13.3%
- [Texas Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/texas-paycheck-calculator) — no state income tax
- [New York Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/new-york-paycheck-calculator) — NYC tax included
- [Florida Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/florida-paycheck-calculator) — no state income tax
- [Illinois Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/illinois-paycheck-calculator) — flat 4.95%
- [Ohio Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/ohio-paycheck-calculator)
- [Georgia Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/georgia-paycheck-calculator) — flat 5.49%
- [Arizona Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/arizona-paycheck-calculator) — flat 2.5%
- [Colorado Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/colorado-paycheck-calculator) — flat 4.4%
- [Washington Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/washington-paycheck-calculator) — no state tax
- [Virginia Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/virginia-paycheck-calculator)
- [Massachusetts Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/massachusetts-paycheck-calculator) — flat 5%
- [North Carolina Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/north-carolina-paycheck-calculator) — flat 4.5%
- [Michigan Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/michigan-paycheck-calculator) — flat 4.25%
- [Pennsylvania Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/pennsylvania-paycheck-calculator) — flat 3.07%
- [New Jersey Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/new-jersey-paycheck-calculator)
- [Maryland Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/maryland-paycheck-calculator)
- [Minnesota Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/minnesota-paycheck-calculator)
- [Nevada Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/nevada-paycheck-calculator) — no state income tax
- [Oregon Paycheck Calculator 2026](https://www.privatepaycheck.com/oregon-paycheck-calculator)

## Key Tax Numbers 2026

- Federal standard deduction: 15,000 single / 30,000 MFJ
- FICA: Social Security 6.2% (wage base 184,500) + Medicare 1.45%
- No Tax on Tips cap: 25,000
- No Tax on Overtime deduction: 12,500
- 401k contribution limit: 23,500
- HSA limit: 4,300 single / 8,550 family
- Senior deduction (65+): 6,000 (phases out at 75K single / 150K MFJ)
